# Posture Fraud

Subtitle: `Why consent is the efficient way`

## Description / Excerpt

A consentocratic essay on attention extraction, declared optimization primitives, membrane fatigue, and why honest consent reduces the energy burden of living inside systems.

Excerpt:

Consent is the efficient way because it forces the optimization target into the open. That is the part almost everyone misses. Consent is often treated as a moral adornment, legal requirement, interpersonal courtesy, or bureaucratic drag. Something that slows systems down. Someth
